generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for controlling the vehicle's speed via NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano hardware"
]

instance SteeringServoActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Manages steering angle adjustments based on ACC control logic for the vehicle's lower-level chassis"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Enables remote emergency braking via Control Panel FE, sending commands to vehicle actuators to halt motion abruptly"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR detects and tracks objects in vehicle's proximity via point cloud generation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLiDARPointCloud
]

instance DepthCameraSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera provides 3D spatial data for object detection and environmental mapping"
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded sensors capture real-time metrics (speed, steering angle) via Data Pre-Processing FE"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance RawLiDARPointCloud : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ActuationCommands : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorActuationFE, SteeringServoActuationFE
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for point cloud processing in Physical Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkProcessing
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filtering for object tracking from raw LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkProcessing
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements ISO 15622 Performance Class I for speed adaptation in Digital Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
]

instance PointCloudProcessingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointCloud
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilterModel
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDataProcessed : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlLogicModel
]

instance VehicleStateReport : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database-stored ego vehicle state and object tracks for post-operation analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 for inter-component communication and modularity across vehicle components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE, VisualizationFE, ControlPanelFE
]

instance Python38Prototyping : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping of Digital Twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE, VisualizationPreProcessingFE
]

instance CppROS2Lifecycle : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management in vehicle components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE, ControlPanelFE
]

instance MATLABSimulinkProcessing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems like point cloud clustering and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilterModel
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for AI/ML processing in Digital Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlLogicModel
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX for sensor processing in Physical Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Data Translation FE for serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment (ROS2 ↔ Wi-Fi)"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware, WiFiCommunication
]

instance VisualizationPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Pre-processes data for human-readable formats in 3D Visualization FE"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingData
]

instance WiFiCommunication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wireless communication protocol for real-time data transmission between Physical and Digital Twin Entities"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), detected object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeStateVisualization, ObjectTrackingVisualization
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic from vehicle ECUs to cloud/DT for high-performance computations"
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to disable/enable ACC, set speeds, and trigger emergency braking"
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates post-operation reports via Reporting FE for analysis"
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle speed, steering angle, and safety margins"
]

instance ObjectTrackingVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of detected object tracks and ACC compliance"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Emergency braking commands and fault detection (e.g., brake system health monitoring)"
]

instance ACCComplianceMonitor : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of ACC system performance against ISO 15622 standards"
]

instance RemoteParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of ACC settings (desired speed, enable/disable) via Control Panel FE"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic emergency braking triggered by Control Panel FE when safety thresholds are exceeded"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Physical Twin Entity Components
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:PhysicalTwinEntity [
    base:desc "Distributed component of the Digital Twin system embedded in the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:contains LiDARSensor, DepthCameraSensor, VehicleStateSensor,
        MotorActuationFE, SteeringServoActuationFE, EmergencyBrakingCommand,
        DataTranslationFE, ROS2Middleware
]

// C13: Digital Twin Entity Components
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwinEntity [
    base:desc "Centralized Digital Twin component hosted externally to the vehicle for high-performance computations"
    DTDFVocab:contains ACCControlLogicModel, ComputationOffloadingService,
        DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

// C14: User Entity Components
instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:UserEntity [
    base:desc "Split into 3D Visualization FE and Control Panel FE for remote management"
    DTDFVocab:contains VisualizationFE, ControlPanelFE
]

instance VisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:UserInterface [
    base:desc "3D Visualization Frontend for environmental data visualization (DataMonitoringService)"
    DTDFVocab:contains RealTimeStateVisualization, ObjectTrackingVisualization
]

instance ControlPanelFE : DTDFVocab:UserInterface [
    base:desc "Control Panel Frontend for remote management (RemoteManagementService)"
    DTDFVocab:contains RemoteParameterUpdateAction, EmergencyBrakingCommandAction
]

// C15: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin Entity** sends the following commands to the **Physical Twin Entity**:
  - **Desired speed adjustments** (via ACC logic) to the **Motor Actuation FE** for adaptive cruise control.
  - **Emergency braking commands** (via the **Control Panel** in the User Entity) to halt the vehicle’s motion.
  - **Remote management commands** (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed) executed through the **Control Panel** FE."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time-scale** is synchronized to **≤100 ms** accuracy for critical operations (e.g., ACC control), ensuring real-time event ordering and data integrity. The **Digital Twin Entity** processes data streams at a rate aligned with the vehicle’s perception cycle (e.g., LiDAR updates), while the **Data Collection FE** captures state data at the same frequency as sensor outputs."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation consists of three primary entities, mapped to ISO 23247:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensor processing (LiDAR/Depth Camera), actuation (Motor/Steering Servo), and data pre-processing (DBSCAN + Kalman filtering). **Not defined in ISO 23247** but analogous to the **Observable Manufacturing Element (OME)**.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data collection (object tracks, ego state), ACC control logic, and reporting (Reporting FE). Aligns with the **Digital Twin Entity** in ISO 23247.
  - **User Entity**: Split into **3D Visualization FE** (for environmental data) and **Control Panel FE** (for remote management), replacing the monolithic **User Interface FE** from ISO 23247.
  The **Cross-System Entity** is implicitly handled via the **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity communication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Used for cyber-physical experimentation (e.g., ACC logic validation) via simulation integration (MATLAB/Simulink).
  - **Manufacturing Phase**: Not directly applicable; the PT is a retrofitted autonomous vehicle.
  - **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance (e.g., emergency braking commands). The DT covers the **as-operated** representation phase of the physical system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: ISO 15622 compliance for ACC control logic (Performance Class I).
  - **Validation**: Real-time synchronization (≤100 ms latency), clock accuracy (±100 ms), and sensor calibration (LiDAR/Depth Camera).
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: DBSCAN/Kalman filtering for robust object tracking in dynamic environments.
  - **Error Mitigation**: Data Translation FE handles unit conversions and message alignment to prevent compatibility issues."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin employs the following technical connections:
  - **Inter-Entity Communication**: Wi-Fi network (UDP-based) for low-latency data exchange between the vehicle and DT Entity.
  - **Protocol Stack**:
    - **ROS2 Network**: For intra-entity communication (Physical Twin/Digital Twin Entities).
    - **Wi-Fi (UDP)**: For inter-entity communication (vehicle ↔ DT Entity).
  - **Network Latency**: ≤100 ms (3GPP 22.185 compliance) for real-time control.
  - **Clock Synchronization**: Achieved via NTP or similar mechanisms (exact method not specified; assumed ±100 ms accuracy)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is hosted externally to the vehicle, deployed on:
  - **Cloud/Edge Infrastructure**: Likely a server or edge device (not specified) for processing ACC logic and data storage.
  - **Deployment Architecture**:
    - **Physical Twin Entity**: Embedded in the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano/Orin X).
    - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on external hardware (e.g., cloud server) for computation offloading.
    - **User Entity**: Accessible via web interface (Control Panel) or 3D visualization (3D Visualization FE)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates horizontally with:
  - **External Information Systems**: Not explicitly detailed; assumed to include vehicle telemetry databases, cloud-based fleet coordination systems, or IoT platforms for remote management.
  - **Other Digital Twins**: Not applicable in this case study; the system focuses on ACC for a single vehicle."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is ambiguous in the document but inferred as follows:
  - **Physical Twin Data**: Owned by the vehicle operator (e.g., ego vehicle speed, detected objects).
  - **Digital Twin Data**: Likely stored centrally (e.g., SQL database) and managed by the DT service provider (e.g., research institution). Privacy considerations are not addressed; no encryption or access controls are mentioned."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system leverages the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247 (Part 2)**: Reference architecture for manufacturing DTs, adapted for automotive use (Physical Twin Entity, Data Translation FE).
  - **ISO 15622**: Standard for ACC control logic (Performance Class I).
  - **3GPP 22.185**: V2V communication latency requirements (≤100 ms).
  - **ROS2**: Middleware for inter-component communication.
  - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: Potential implementation for Data Translation FE (not explicitly used)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety-Critical Compliance**: ISO 15622 for ACC control (Performance Class I), ensuring safe following distance and emergency braking.
  - **Latency Constraints**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (3GPP 22.185) to prevent catastrophic failures.
  - **Clock Synchronization**: ±100 ms accuracy for event ordering and data integrity.
  - **Remote Management Risks**: Emergency braking commands are triggered via the Control Panel FE, but no explicit security protocols (e.g., TLS, authentication) are mentioned for DT-to-PT communication. Human-in-the-loop (Fully Autonomous Digital Twin) ensures operator oversight."
]
